Hey, this will be a quick update on our end-of-month fundraising goal:

We've made up a ton of ground. We crunched the numbers, and we can definitely hit this goal by our Wednesday deadline -- **but only if 168 people from Pennsylvania chip in.**

**[Can you be one of the 168? Every single donation -- of $3 or whatever you can pitch in -- adds up and makes a huge difference. name: Tina Smith
subject: Send a message directly to Mitch McConnell:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Here's how.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190728_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

Mitch McConnell is blocking legislation related to election security and foreign interference in our elections.

He was silent as Donald Trump launched racist attacks at members of Congress.

**And time and time again, McConnell has stopped every ounce of progress we 're fighting for -- and instead spent the Senate's time packing the courts with more of Trump's right-wing judges. **

Enough is enough. We have to take back the Senate and send him a message right now he can't ignore.

**[Will you make a contribution to my re-election campaign as a way of showing Mitch McConnell that you are ready for a Democratic Senate that will fight for our values? This seat is critical to taking back the Senate and unseating him as majority leader.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190728_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4e3d0/c1f7015/657e0b66/1146da91/3703213756/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLWp1bHkyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJydHdfMjAxOTA3MjhfZW0ifQ==/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190728_em-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Kamala HQ
subject: A piece of our movement belongs to you
body:
You’re a member of this grassroots team, so we want to be real with you about our
fundraising numbers.

When we ask for you to contribute -- often via emails like this one --
we’re not just asking for $5, $10, or even $25. We’re asking you to invest
in our campaign -- to own a piece of this movement from the start.

Today, we’re asking for you to make an
investment in Kamala’s historic campaign for president. As you know, we’re
up against major fundraising deadline this Wednesday. Anything you can add
will help us reach our goal:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190728-eom?refcode=ema190728-eom22-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5790_5755789_8p6j_t&akid=5790%2E5755789%2E8p6j_t ]Chip in $5 now

At this phase of our campaign, here’s what your investment will go toward:

* Hiring organizers across the country, who will build coalitions and
relationships with community leaders and voters in their regions.
* Investing in targeted digital ads in critical early states to spread
our campaign’s message online, reaching new audiences and undecided
voters.
* Keeping Kamala out on the road, meeting with undecided voters and
listening to critical issues facing everyday Americans.

And that’s just for this upcoming week. We’re expanding our campaign even
further every day, adding more to our operation because that’s what it
will take if we want to win. That’s where your investment goes: into
executing a winning campaign.

We couldn’t do this without you. Truly. So if you can afford to, please
do us a favor and add a contribution
to support Kamala, help us with our fundraising goals, and sustain our
campaign.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

[**_We need your help. Read Peter 's note, then chip in._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190728_TH_20190728-fr-TH-48hrtopper-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Team Hickenlooper

\---------------------------

**Sender:** Peter Cunningham, Team Hickenlooper
**Subject:** Looking ahead to September
**Date:** Sun July 28

Friend, John's looking ahead to Tuesday's debate, and he'll be preparing hard in these next 48 hours to make sure the most important issues facing our country get the attention they deserve on stage.

**Meanwhile, I 'm looking ahead to September.** The truth is, Tuesday and Wednesday will represent the end of the road for many candidates in this race. On stage in September will be the true leaders--the ones with the support and momentum to prevail in this primary and go on to beat Donald Trump.

**Friend, John should be on that stage in September.** He's run a small business, a city and a state--that experience and perspective need to be represented on that stage. Anything less would be a disservice to voters who are seeking a candidate with a track record of bold, progressive results. And he's moving up in the polls.

[**_One month from today, we need to have 130,000 donors to qualify for the next debate stage. Help us get there._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Mitch McConnell's Super PAC and dark money group just raised over $20,000,000 to attack Democrats like Dan and protect his Republican Senate majority.
|
---

| | **Nate Silver: Colorado is one of Democrats ' two best pickup opportunities in the Senate** ** **
We know it's Sunday, we'll be quick:

**[We need 100 donors to pitch in before midnight so we can flip must-win Colorado and protect our chances of taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827a6/232dfd1/9c1b6a9/62a12a7e/1363072330/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_alert_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Nate Silver just said that Colorado is one of Democrats' two best pickup opportunities in the Senate.

That means if we want any shot at flipping the Senate, we MUST win here.

There's just one problem:

Mitch McConnell's Super PAC and dark money group just raised over $20,000,000 to attack Democrats like Dan and protect his Republican Senate majority.

Dan's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money.

To fight back and finally oust Mitch McConnell, we need your help.

_**(Trust us -- grassroots donations like yours are what truly make the difference!)**_

Can you chip in $19 before midnight so we can win Colorado, flip the Senate, and ditch Mitch?

name: Tim Ryan [personal]
subject: quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Friend,

I'm taking a quick break from debate prep and wanted to drop you a short note.

**It 's clear our country needs to change direction.** Donald Trump is more interested in scoring political points and making outrageous, offensive comments than leading. His actions divide rather than unite.

I'm running for President because it's time we move from old systems and rebuild a new America that invests in public education, affordable health care and an economy that works for all of us. **An America united by a shared vision for our future.**

Tomorrow's debate will be a defining moment in this race. I'll be squaring off against some tough competitors. _But I believe our message of investing in our values so we can focus on what really matters - healing and uniting our nation - will carry the day._

**Friend, I need your support now more than ever. Will you contribute to our campaign today to ensure we have the resources to carry our message from Detroit to communities and cities across America in the days ahead?**

Thank you for your continuing support. It means so much to me to know you're standing with me.

Tim

name: Mark Dayton
subject: The results speak for themselves
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Public service is about making a positive difference in people's lives. The best leaders don't just use this is as a talking point. They rely on it as a guiding principle, and they have the backbone to follow through. Tim Walz is one of those great leaders, and it shows. He puts Minnesotans first and the results speak for themselves. In the face of intense Republican opposition last Legislative Session, he was able to beat the odds and pass a budget that will improve the lives of millions throughout our state. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmcc7GhrdNtMdBq_hkjyIDyzMsd1FPdMW7QMylhxo2g=/ygftV6DB4QlAzcKDyx_hCfO5_v6hi2DVwdW-GaFwyFw=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
Public service is about making a positive difference in people's lives.
The best leaders don't just use this is as a talking point. They rely on it as a guiding principle, and they have the backbone to follow through.
**Tim Walz is one of those great leaders, and it shows. He puts Minnesotans first and the results speak for themselves.** In the face of intense Republican opposition last Legislative Session, he was able to beat the odds and pass a budget that will improve the lives of millions throughout our state.
While President Trump continues to sow fear and division from the highest levels of government for his own political gain, we need to support leaders like Tim more than ever before.
**That 's why I'm reaching out personally to ask: [Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help Tim reach his $10,000 end-of-month goal by Wednesday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmcc7GhrdNtMdBq_hkjyIDyzMsd1FPdMW7QMylhxo2g=/ygftV6DB4QlAzcKDyx_hCfO5_v6hi2DVwdW-GaFwyFw=?refcode=body&amount=25)**

****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmcc7GhrdNtMdBq_hkjyIDyzMsd1FPdMW7QMylhxo2g=/ygftV6DB4QlAzcKDyx_hCfO5_v6hi2DVwdW-GaFwyFw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-d)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/xmcc7GhrdNtMdBq_hkjyIDyzMsd1FPdMW7QMylhxo2g=/ygftV6DB4QlAzcKDyx_hCfO5_v6hi2DVwdW-GaFwyFw=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-d)****

Tim has never been one to sit quietly on the sidelines, either. He knows what's at stake if Trump succeeds in flipping Minnesota red with his fear-mongering next year.
Politics is a team effort, and he's going to be working hard to elect effective leaders who will help move his positive vision for One Minnesota forward, not divide us and take us backward.

Mark Dayton

name: Joe Sestak
subject: "The Peculiar, Surprisingly Effective Campaign of Joe Sestak"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I wanted to share this great article by Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line with you ([read here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8636377/83908490/2128061837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2RlMjhhYy0xMmIyLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1dLCdbZA609ueQ9xq3Q1iBztz6dkXnYNyvU-EKooMNQ=)) on...
**The Peculiar, Surprisingly Effective Campaign of Joe Sestak**
On July 29, 2019
By Pat Rynard - photos by Julie Fleming
Retired admiral Joe Sestak’s presidential campaign announcement was noticed almost by accident.
Explaining his entrance into the crowded field in a June 23 video on a campaign website few knew existed, word of the then-24th Democratic candidate slowly spread through political journalist Twitter. No major profile pieces, media roll-outs or cable news tours accompanied it.
Sestak had arrived in Iowa the day before, telling only a handful of former campaign and congressional aides three days ahead of time about his plans. He worked with an old acquaintance from Iowa to build his presidential website.
Unbeknownst to any media, Sestak’s first stop was to Antioch Baptist Church in Waterloo that Sunday morning. His inaugural public event, later that evening at the Sullivan Brothers Veterans Museum, came mere hours after anyone realized he was running. A few reporters quickly got up to it in time because there were literally no other candidate events in Iowa that day. Sestak’s local turnout that night was one short of the number of Sullivan brothers.

His campaign since has been exceedingly low-profile, though it’s not like a former two-term congressman from Pennsylvania who started late in the race was going to get a ton of national attention.
What Sestak has done, however, is show up everywhere in Iowa. Literally, everywhere.
In fact, since arriving in the lead-off caucus state on the first day of his candidacy, he hasn’t left. Sestak has been in Iowa for 36 days straight, meaning he has surpassed every single other Democrat in the amount of time spent in the state this year.
And he’s adopted an unorthodox, guerrilla-style strategy to campaigning here that is... actually going kinda well, frankly.
“We’re camping out, we’re not moving,” Sestak told Starting Line in an interview on Saturday. “We’ve got a great group rate with the Econo Lodge. They love us.”
Last week, he attended a meet-and-greet with the Linn County Democrats, the third time he’d been to the state’s second-largest county. About 150 people were there, and when Sestak asked how many of them had already seen him, half the room raised their hands. Nearly all the rest said they had at least heard of him.
“The reception is Iowa Nice,” Sestak said. “I think we’ve gotten decent exposure. We know the situation we’re in.”
Part of how he’s gotten his name out: brochures. Tens of thousands of them.
Sestak and his campaign estimates they’ve pass out between 4,000 and 6,000 campaign fliers a day in Iowa. One man attended Sestak’s stop in Linn County because he’d gotten one placed on his windshield. An hour after he’d taken it off, another one replaced it.
“It’s an inexpensive way to do it,” Sestak explained. “And I understand, you don’t win elections with it, but you sure gain a little bit of attention. So, when they eventually see me on the air or something, they’ve already seen it.”
But where did he find supporters to help with that? It was a few weeks before Sestak’s small crew of campaign staff arrived in Iowa. No one really knew who he was yet.
So, he improvised — by recruiting homeless veterans.
“The first day I got here, I didn’t have any volunteers, so I asked where there’s homeless veterans places,” Sestak said. “I like to go to them, they’ll always help. For the first week or so, that was my supporters. I needed people to go to parades and do things. We recruited them, paid them some money, invited them here, plus bought them lunch and dinner.”
And with that, the Sestak presidential campaign was off and running.
So, too, was the candidate. He’s already been to seven or eight parades in Iowa, sprinting back and forth from either side of the route to shake hands and pass out brochures.
“Would you take me home tonight and read about me?” Sestak said he tells people. “And they chuckle.”
His campaign staff call him an “energizer bunny” and admit they can’t always keep up with his pace. They estimate that Sestak has shaken 25,000 hands so far in Iowa, and as a team they’ve passed out 50,000 brochures.
While Sestak’s campaign is officially headquartered in Alexandria, Virginia, the bulk of his small team – mostly younger men – is here in Iowa. Among them is a former intern from his congressional office and two staffers from past Senate runs (Sestak ran unsuccessfully for U.S. Senate in 2010 and 2016 – he defeated party-switcher Arlen Specter in the 2010 primary). All left jobs to quickly come out to help Sestak.
Due to his late entry, Sestak has run into difficulties. He got in too late to schedule an event with Central Iowa’s influential Asian and Latino Coalition group before they endorse, but he’s found ways to improvise.
At the Des Moines Econo Lodge he and his team stays at, Sestak has made friends with both the owner and the Latino construction crew that’s working on the building. The owner is going to introduce Sestak to Iowans at his local Hindu temple. The construction workers have been taking brochures to hand out, and they plan to take Sestak out to some events where a couple hundred Latino voters will be at.
“We chat with people,” Sestak said. “That’s the great thing about politics. You can ask to go to places.”
Sometimes, he just shows up. Sestak has popped up at a number of larger Democratic gatherings in Iowa, occasionally to the surprise of organizers. He wasn’t on the speakers list for the West Des Moines Democrats’ 4th of July picnic, but was there all the same. He didn’t throw himself into the large crowd of selfie-seekers or media scrum like Kamala Harris and Amy Klobuchar did, instead content to stand on the outskirts of the event, chatting up older attendees one by one.
If it seems like an odd strategy, perhaps it is less so to Sestak, who has been successful with nontraditional approaches before.
“When I ran against Weldon, I just jumped in,” Sestak recounted of his first campaign in which he defeated incumbent Curt Weldon in a two-to-one Republican congressional district. “When I went to see the local Democratic Party chair in Delaware County, he said you’ve got to tell the DCCC. True story, I said, Delaware County Community College? What do they care?”
Still, he’s well aware of the challenges he face.
“I won’t get the [national] town halls like others,” he admits. “I have an email from one of the cable companies that they don’t know I have, saying don’t put Joe Sestak on. I have to break through that ... We’re aiming for the Fall debates. If it’s not the first, we’d like to be in the second.”
While he’d been thinking about a presidential run for months, a health scare with his daughter, who developed a brain tumor that’s since disappeared, pushed back his plans.
“Slowly but surely, this is how it’s going to work,” he said. “Do I wish it was five months ago? Yeah. Is it? No. I landed on a beach and that’s the situation, deal with it. You don’t go back to the LCM and cry. Do I think the DNC rules should be about the money? No. But you get in, you play by the rules. You don’t moan about them.”
“I can’t be a tortoise, gotta be a bit faster than that,” he added. “But I can also be where [other candidates] aren’t physically.”
And when Sestak is physically in front of caucus-goers, he has a unique story to tell.
Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, “When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan...,” as he did at his first “Cup of Joe” events in Clive this weekend.
A retired three-star vice admiral, Sestak stood before a map of Iran on Saturday with a group of three dozen local Democrats and Chinese exchange students, explaining the dangers of abandoning diplomacy in the Middle East.
“Militaries can stop a problem, but militaries can never fix a problem,” he noted.
Whether anyone left a committed Sestak caucus supporter or not, they all certainly learned something. And, notably, Sestak has one of the more built-out policy sections of any candidate’s campaign website.
However, while Sestak’s profile is obviously focused on military service, his actual passion lies more with domestic issues.
“My real bread and butter as a congressman was not on foreign policy,” he explained after the event. “I only went to Armed Services, asked to get out of Intelligence, so I could move stuff like autism money in DOD. That’s where the money is. I knew that ... The autism rate in military families is twice as high as civilians.”
The reason for that lies in his rationale to run for office in the first place, which he alluded to when asked by an attendee at his event what his most formative life experience was.
“The day they rolled my four-year-old child out of Walter Reed surgery,” Sestak replied.
His daughter Alexandra survived brain cancer at a young age. He left the Navy to care for her and, while in the hospital, met many families that didn’t have the same health care coverage his family did. He decided to run for Congress back in 2006 to expand health care access to more Americans.
Now, while out on the campaign trail, he wears a bracelet with his daughter’s name on it that she made while she was four, in between games of My Little Pony with her parents in the hospital room.
“It’s broken a couple times, but most of these are still the original,” he said of the bracelet’s colorful plastic jewels. “So, I never take it off ... I think the lord had a lot to do [with her recovery], I got that. I think medicine really had a lot, I got that. But I think this and luck had a lot, too. I never take it off, even when sleeping.”
Check out my site ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8636378/83908491/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2RlMjhhYy0xMmIyLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1dLCdbZA609ueQ9xq3Q1iBztz6dkXnYNyvU-EKooMNQ=)) to read more about who I am and where my campaign is going next.
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to share this great article by Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line with you (=) on... The Peculiar, Surprisingly Effective Campaign of Joe Sestak On July 29, 2019 By Pat Rynard - photos by Julie Fleming Retired admiral Joe Sestak’s presidential campaign announcement was noticed almost by accident. Explaining his entrance into the crowded field in a June 23 video on a campaign website few knew existed, word of the then-24th Democratic candidate slowly spread through political journalist Twitter. No major profile pieces, media roll-outs or cable news tours accompanied it. Sestak had arrived in Iowa the day before, telling only a handful of former campaign and congressional aides three days ahead of time about his plans. He worked with an old acquaintance from Iowa to build his presidential website. Unbeknownst to any media, Sestak’s first stop was to Antioch Baptist Church in Waterloo that Sunday morning. His inaugural public event, later that evening at the Sullivan Brothers Veterans Museum, came mere hours after anyone realized he was running. A few reporters quickly got up to it in time because there were literally no other candidate events in Iowa that day. Sestak’s local turnout that night was one short of the number of Sullivan brothers. His campaign since has been exceedingly low-profile, though it’s not like a former two-term congressman from Pennsylvania who started late in the race was going to get a ton of national attention. What Sestak has done, however, is show up everywhere in Iowa. Literally, everywhere. In fact, since arriving in the lead-off caucus state on the first day of his candidacy, he hasn’t left. Sestak has been in Iowa for 36 days straight, meaning he has surpassed every single other Democrat in the amount of time spent in the state this year. And he’s adopted an unorthodox, guerrilla-style strategy to campaigning here that is... actually going kinda well, frankly. “We’re camping out, we’re not moving,” Sestak told Starting Line in an interview on Saturday. “We’ve got a great group rate with the Econo Lodge. They love us.” Last week, he attended a meet-and-greet with the Linn County Democrats, the third time he’d been to the state’s second-largest county. About 150 people were there, and when Sestak asked how many of them had already seen him, half the room raised their hands. Nearly all the rest said they had at least heard of him. “The reception is Iowa Nice,” Sestak said. “I think we’ve gotten decent exposure. We know the situation we’re in.” Part of how he’s gotten his name out: brochures. Tens of thousands of them. Sestak and his campaign estimates they’ve pass out between 4,000 and 6,000 campaign fliers a day in Iowa. One man attended Sestak’s stop in Linn County because he’d gotten one placed on his windshield. An hour after he’d taken it off, another one replaced it. “It’s an inexpensive way to do it,” Sestak explained. “And I understand, you don’t win elections with it, but you sure gain a little bit of attention. So, when they eventually see me on the air or something, they’ve already seen it.” But where did he find supporters to help with that? It was a few weeks before Sestak’s small crew of campaign staff arrived in Iowa. No one really knew who he was yet. So, he improvised — by recruiting homeless veterans. “The first day I got here, I didn’t have any volunteers, so I asked where there’s homeless veterans places,” Sestak said. “I like to go to them, they’ll always help. For the first week or so, that was my supporters. I needed people to go to parades and do things. We recruited them, paid them some money, invited them here, plus bought them lunch and dinner.” And with that, the Sestak presidential campaign was off and running. So, too, was the candidate. He’s already been to seven or eight parades in Iowa, sprinting back and forth from either side of the route to shake hands and pass out brochures. “Would you take me home tonight and read about me?” Sestak said he tells people. “And they chuckle.” His campaign staff call him an “energizer bunny” and admit they can’t always keep up with his pace. They estimate that Sestak has shaken 25,000 hands so far in Iowa, and as a team they’ve passed out 50,000 brochures. While Sestak’s campaign is officially headquartered in Alexandria, Virginia, the bulk of his small team – mostly younger men – is here in Iowa. Among them is a former intern from his congressional office and two staffers from past Senate runs (Sestak ran unsuccessfully for U.S. Senate in 2010 and 2016 – he defeated party-switcher Arlen Specter in the 2010 primary). All left jobs to quickly come out to help Sestak. Due to his late entry, Sestak has run into difficulties. He got in too late to schedule an event with Central Iowa’s influential Asian and Latino Coalition group before they endorse, but he’s found ways to improvise. At the Des Moines Econo Lodge he and his team stays at, Sestak has made friends with both the owner and the Latino construction crew that’s working on the building. The owner is going to introduce Sestak to Iowans at his local Hindu temple. The construction workers have been taking brochures to hand out, and they plan to take Sestak out to some events where a couple hundred Latino voters will be at. “We chat with people,” Sestak said. “That’s the great thing about politics. You can ask to go to places.” Sometimes, he just shows up. Sestak has popped up at a number of larger Democratic gatherings in Iowa, occasionally to the surprise of organizers. He wasn’t on the speakers list for the West Des Moines Democrats’ 4th of July picnic, but was there all the same. He didn’t throw himself into the large crowd of selfie-seekers or media scrum like Kamala Harris and Amy Klobuchar did, instead content to stand on the outskirts of the event, chatting up older attendees one by one. If it seems like an odd strategy, perhaps it is less so to Sestak, who has been successful with nontraditional approaches before. “When I ran against Weldon, I just jumped in,” Sestak recounted of his first campaign in which he defeated incumbent Curt Weldon in a two-to-one Republican congressional district. “When I went to see the local Democratic Party chair in Delaware County, he said you’ve got to tell the DCCC. True story, I said, Delaware County Community College? What do they care?” Still, he’s well aware of the challenges he face. “I won’t get the [national] town halls like others,” he admits. “I have an email from one of the cable companies that they don’t know I have, saying don’t put Joe Sestak on. I have to break through that ... We’re aiming for the Fall debates. name: Kamala Harris
subject: How my Medicare for All plan works
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
This isn’t a radical idea: health care should be a right, not a privilege for only those who can afford it. **[That’s why I just released my plan to create a Medicare for All health care system when I’m elected president.**](https://action.kamalaharris.org/go/12678?t=1&akid=5793%2E5755789%2EAOgtN1) Since Trump took office, more than seven million Americans have lost their health care coverage while many more are forced to choose between life-saving medication and putting food on the table. I'm going to fix that with my Medicare for All plan: In our America...
* You can go to the doctor and know you are covered;
* Middle-class and low-income families will not shoulder the burden for Medicare for All -- Wall Street will;
* If you need reproductive care...you’re covered;
* Families with pre-existing conditions are covered, no matter what;
* You can change jobs and your health coverage goes with you;
* All Americans will receive the health care they need.

That’s the core of my plan -- but I need you to join me in this fight today if we’re going to pass a Medicare for All plan that guarantees quality health care for every American. **[Sign my petition if you support creating a Medicare for All system in America that will lower costs, expand options, and make Wall Street, not middle-class families, bear the brunt of the burden.**](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-MFA?refcode=ema190729-full&source=ema190729-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=5793%2E5755789%2EAOgtN1) | | [ SIGN THE PETITION](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-MFA?refcode=ema190729-full&source=ema190729-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=5793%2E5755789%2EAOgtN1)
---
This isn’t about ideology. It’s about delivering results for the American people because nothing is more personal than our health care. I know this from my own personal experience, caring for my mother as she battled colon cancer.
It’s important that we get this right and I’m asking you to join me today.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list. You can [adjust your email preferences here](https://action.kamalaharris.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=4&akid=5793%2E5755789%2EAOgtN1), or [unsubscribe from receiving further emails here.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5793%2E5755789%2EAOgtN1)

| I've got a huge smile on my face right now, team. Last night we hit the 130,000 donor threshold! That's incredible for a couple of reasons. Now it's official: When I take the stage on Wednesday, I know I'll be one of the candidates moving on to the next round of debates in September. **And that's because of you.** But this isn't just some big, abstract number. Each of those 130,000 donations represents a person who put their faith in me and our grassroots campaign. **Despite the fact that we 're an underdog in this race, 130,000 people stepped up to embrace a message that's unapologetically bold and optimistic** \-- that's truly something special. So, from the bottom of my heart, thank you. I will do everything I can to make you proud this Wednesday -- and in September and beyond. subject: Will you be watching?

body:

body:
In case you've missed it, here's the latest campaign news from this month:
|

[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa267/18d6a294/4b65ccaf/26d6688a/1089864552/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | I'll make this quick -- in case you've missed it, here's the latest campaign news from this month:
* Bill Haslam announced he wouldn't run.
* That decision cleared the way for the president to tweet-launch his handpicked candidate's campaign -- weeks before any other announcement was made.
* Another opponent gave $1 million to his own campaign.

This is going to be a tough race. Here's how we win: While Republicans race to win a primary by telling Tennesseans why they're best equipped to carry out the president's agenda -- an agenda that has Tennessee 1) leading the nation in closed rural hospitals per person, 2) hasn't done anything to end an opioid epidemic ravaging our communities, and 3) has conducted a trade war of choice that hurts Tennessee more than any other state -- we build up the financial resources to reinforce that we need change. name: kamalaharris.org
subject: Honestly
body:
I just got an email from Kamala. She asked for an update of our progress
towards our July fundraising goal -- and I let her know that we’re about
halfway there.

This means we still have some work to do before Wednesday ... but I think we
can make this happen.

Honestly, if each of Kamala’s supporters contributed just $1, we could hit
this goal today.

That’s why I’m asking: can you pitch in right now? Counting on you to hit our crucial July
fundraising goal for Kamala:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190729-eom?refcode=ema190729-eom23-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5796_5755789_pOQQKy&akid=5796%2E5755789%2EpOQQKy ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190729-eom?refcode=ema190729-eom23-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5796_5755789_pOQQKy&akid=5796%2E5755789%2EpOQQKy ]Chip in $250 now

Unlike other candidates in this race, Kamala didn’t launch this campaign
with a war chest of cash -- and she’s not self-funding a campaign with
millions like some of the billionaires in the running.

This is pure, old-fashioned grassroots fundraising -- the way campaigns
should be run -- which means we’re relying on real people stepping up to
do what they can to make this thing possible.

So what do you say? If you can, will you add
a donation to Kamala’s campaign
right now and make sure we reach our goal by Wednesday? Every dollar goes
a long way:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

I’m really hopeful that I can tell Kamala we reached our goal before she
heads to the debate stage. I just know it will give her a boost of
confidence to know how much this grassroots team has her back.

Thanks,

— Jenn

Jenn Liu
Finance Team
Kamala 2020

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: humbly asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Speaker Pelosi asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Gabby Giffords asked. Paul Begala asked. But, I wanted to ask you personally: I'm about to hit my very first end-of-month deadline since a self-funding Republican entered the race to defeat me. **I need 3,157 grassroots donors to become founding members in order to reach my critical goal, win my race, and and defeat McConnell's Senate.** | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d244/261004515/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
**dpwillis67@gmail.com**
[ _**Suggested Support: $15 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d244/261004515/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")
---

Look, I know winning this race and flipping the Senate won't be easy.

**But you helped me lead the charge to take back the House last year -- and I know you 'll help me take back the Senate, too.**

If I can reach this end-of-month goal, we'll have an unstoppable foundation for victory.

So I'm humbly asking: Will you chip in $15 before my critical deadline in 48 hours? It would mean so much to me.

| [**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d245/261004515/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---

[**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d27a/261004515/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=15")
---

[**Chip in $30 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d27b/261004515/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=30")
---

[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d278/261004515/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=50")
---

[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d244/261004515/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d279/261004515/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d27e/261004515/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d27f/261004515/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d27c/261004515/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b506/18e32a7f/57c53eeb/7bb4d27d/261004515/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. clean_body: | | Speaker Pelosi asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Gabby Giffords asked. Paul Begala asked. But, I wanted to ask you personally: I'm about to hit my very first end-of-month deadline since a self-funding Republican entered the race to defeat me. I need 3,157 grassroots donors to become founding members in order to reach my critical goal, win my race, and and defeat McConnell's Senate. | "" dpwillis67@gmail.com "" Look, I know winning this race and flipping the Senate won't be easy. But you helped me lead the charge to take back the House last year -- and I know you 'll help me take back the Senate, too. If I can reach this end-of-month goal, we'll have an unstoppable foundation for victory. So I'm humbly asking: Will you chip in $15 before my critical deadline in 48 hours? It would mean so much to me. | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Ben Ray | "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? "" We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = 50&refcode=expresslane 50 = 100&refcode=expresslane 100 = 250&refcode=expresslane 250 = 50&refcode=expresslane 500 Thank you for all that you do, Elisa Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

name: no-reply @ TimRyanforAmerica.com
subject: just one more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Bumping this message from Tim. This is what we've been building towards since we launched. Let's do this!

[**If you haven 't already, will you chip in $3 right now so Tim can show more momentum than anyone else on the stage tomorrow?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+If+you+havenrsquot+already+will+you+chip&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2")

Here's a link to give: **[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/keepupthefight](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomkeepupthe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2")**

**Begin Forwarded Message:**

> Friend,
>
> I'm taking a quick break from debate prep and wanted to drop you a short note.
>
> **It 's clear our country needs to change direction.** Donald Trump is more interested in scoring political points and making outrageous, offensive comments than leading. His actions divide rather than unite.
>
> I'm running for President because it's time we move from old systems and rebuild a new America that invests in public education, affordable health care and an economy that works for all of us. **An America united by a shared vision for our future.**
>
> Tomorrow's debate will be a defining moment in this race. I'll be squaring off against some tough competitors. _But I believe our message of investing in our values so we can focus on what really matters - healing and uniting our nation - will carry the day._
>
> **Friend, I need your support now more than ever. Will you contribute to our campaign today to ensure we have the resources to carry our message from Detroit to communities and cities across America in the days ahead?**
>
> [**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/keepupthefight**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-july2019?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomkeepupthe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2")
>
> Thank you for your continuing support. It means so much to me to know you're standing with me.
>
> Tim
>
>
>

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c62/5486deaa/3c8f433d/dc8969e/1882293752/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2")

so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c62/5486deaa/3c8f433d/dc89681/1882293752/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9c62/5486deaa/3c8f433d/dc89680/1882293752/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIzYzhmNDMzZCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTljNjIifQ==/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/3c8f433d/d7a9c62?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190729_1_1_T2")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump’s Ability to Protect America Strengthened by Supreme Court Ruling on Border Wall
body:
"Friday’s Supreme Court decision allowing President Trump to transfer $2.5 billion of Defense Department funds to defend our southern border..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5395829fe0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump’s Ability to Protect America Strengthened by Supreme Court Ruling on Border Wall**

“Friday’s Supreme Court decision allowing President Trump to transfer $2.5 billion of Defense Department funds to defend our southern border by building hundreds of miles of wall to replace existing fencing will protect the American people and our national sovereignty,” writes Tom Homan, a top immigration official under both Presidents Trump and Obama.

“News stories are calling this a victory for the president, which it is. But far more importantly, the ruling that will allow Pentagon funding for border wall construction in Arizona, California and New Mexico is a victory for our country.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71203b3f5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The fallout from Wednesday’s disastrous performance by Robert Mueller in the Capitol includes a nearly 450-page report now in question. We don’t know who wrote it. We don’t know who really ran the investigation. We do know that several investigators on Mueller’s team were rabidly anti-Trump and pro-Hillary Clinton,” the [_Boston Herald_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fe5de7cfc&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Members of the team attended Clinton events, donated to her campaign and even legally represented some of her associates.”
---
|
---
| “I feel great sympathy for the plight of the impoverished citizens of Maryland’s 7th Congressional District. For decades the Democrats have promised them jobs, good schools and safe communities. Residents waited patiently for the Promised Land, only to discover the Democrats’ policies had turned their congressional district into a dystopian wasteland,” Todd Starnes writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc67bde93c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Vice President Mike Pence talked Friday with former prisoners about reentering the workforce as he and Ivanka Trump, the president’s daughter, visited Jacksonville sites that highlighted the area’s economic boom,” Steve Patterson reports for [_The Florida Times-Union_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4f321916b&e=3ee4985eea). “The midday visit continued a chain of appearances the two have made nationally to celebrate President Donald Trump’s Pledge to the American Worker initiative.”
---
|
---
| Last week, White House Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt “addressed the United Nations Security Council on reaching a comprehensive peace deal between Israel and the Palestinians, and he had some blunt words for an institution that for decades has failed to resolve the conflict,” Eric Shawn reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c5d71c5f6&e=3ee4985eea). “We want tremendous lives for the Palestinians. We want lives that mirror the lives of Israelis as long as we can keep everybody secure,” Greenblatt said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ef472ad12&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1be6071a2b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ec0206970e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: [Survey] OurRevolution.com
subject: Should CNN use the debate to focus on issues that matter to Americans?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
should debates be focused on issues?

[**Answer our survey to tell us how you think the media should handle presidential debates ->**](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/should-the-debates-focus-on-important-issues-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+Answer+our+survey+to+tell+us+how+you+thi&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1")
**[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/should-the-debates-focus-on-important-issues-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1")**

* * *
Are you ready for this week's presidential primary debate, friend?

Bernie's vision of directly challenging big money in politics has already defined the 2020 election cycle, and now the issues that he's always been fighting for -- Medicare for All, College for All, Good Jobs for All, Environmental Justice, Justice for All, and more -- are dominating the discourse.

However, we know that the corporate media (90% of all U.S. media is controlled by a small number of multinational corporations, some of whom do business in industries like health care) will do everything possible to distract from the fact that all of these ideas are popular with the majority of Americans.

That's why we are asking for your advice on how the media could do a better job with presidential debates.

[_**Answer here to let us know how you think the media should handle presidential debates ->**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/should-the-debates-focus-on-important-issues-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+Answer+here+to+let+us+know+how+you+think&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1")

When Bernie first stepped onto the national debate stage nearly four years ago during his 2016 campaign for president, ideas like getting big money out of politics, a $15 an hour minimum wage, healthcare for all and free college for all were considered fringe. Now, they are mainstream.

The momentum for Bernie's vision is a direct threat to the big money interests that profit from the status quo. That's why we can expect to see all sorts of misleading tactics to distract from the issues that are important to non-wealthy Americans.

[_**How can the media do a better job focusing on the issues at presidential debates? Let us know here ->**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/should-the-debates-focus-on-important-issues-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+How+can+the+media+do+a+better+job+focusi&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1")

As Bernie always says: change happens from the bottom up. It always has, and it always will.

That's why Our Revolution groups across the country are working hard to build a grassroots political movement powerful enough to take on the political establishment and every special interest that stands in the way of our policies passing the House and Senate.

We must elect a Democrat who will defeat Donald Trump next year, but no candidate is capable of challenging the rise of authoritarianism or the entrenched power of our political establishment without a united grassroots movement behind them.

[_**Before this week 's debate, share your thoughts on how the media could better serve American voters by using the debates to focus on the issues.**_](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/should-the-debates-focus-on-important-issues-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+Before+this+weekrsquos+debate+share+your&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1")
**[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/should-the-debates-focus-on-important-issues-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1")**
Thanks for sharing your opinion.

In Solidarity,

The whole team at Our Revolution

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a3d6/bed43eb/ad6daa2e/75fa3203/2471048152/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a3d6/bed43eb/ad6daa2e/75fa320d/2471048152/VEsHBQ/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=10+-+contributing+to+Our+Revolution+here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1&source=OR_EM_SV_180DO_190729_1_1").

name: URGENT (via Team Baer)
subject: Mitch McConnell just announced:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
McConnell just announced that corporations and ultra wealthy donors funneled him over $20,000,000 this year.
|
---

| | We have 3 critical pieces of news to share:

**First,** MSNBC named Dan's opponent, Cory Gardner, the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the entire country.

**Then,** Mitch McConnell begged ultra wealthy donors to dump cash to protect the Senate.

**Now,** McConnell just announced that corporations and ultra wealthy donors funneled him over $20,000,000 this year.

We can't let McConnell's huge checks crush our chance at flipping the Senate and ousting him for good. Can you rush in $19 before the End of Month Deadline in 48 hours to win Colorado and take back the entire Senate? | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827a4/232dfd1/9c41dc2/62a12921/3159521753/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_urgent_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

MSNBC, CNN, and Nate Silver all say that Democrats MUST win Colorado to flip the Senate.

If we lose, we're looking at another two years of obstructionist Mitch McConnell running the Senate. The Supreme Court, health care, tackling climate change, investing in education... it's all on the line.

We need 100 new donors before our critical End of Month Deadline to take on McConnell's cash haul.

Can you rush in $19 so we can flip the Senate and oust Mitch McConnell?

| [**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827a4/232dfd1/9c41dc2/62a12921/3159521753/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_urgent_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Team Baer

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Susan Collins's vote for Kavanaugh was all the proof we needed that she doesn't care about supporting other women and is always willing to do the bidding of Donald Trump. It's clear that she has no place in the Senate.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Susan Collins's vote for Kavanaugh was all the proof we needed that she doesn't care about supporting other women and is **always** willing to do the bidding of Donald Trump. It's clear that she has no place in the Senate. But we'll need to support a strong, experienced Democrat in 2020 if we're going to unseat Collins -- which is why we're endorsing Democrat Sara Gideon for Senate: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0709/72412298/432daf4a/61023139/2522326859/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyOV9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1") **Sara has a clear mandate from Maine: nearly half of her donors so far have been in-state, compared to just 5% of Collins 's.** **_But Collins has raised more money after voting to confirm Kavanaugh than at any other time in her Senate caree_ r****** from right-wing forces determined to keep the Senate in GOP hands and implement their extremist agenda -- which involves taking healthcare from millions of Americans and stripping women of their reproductive rights. Peter -- Susan Collins is one of the most unpopular Senators in the nation, second only to Mitch McConnell, and her approval rating is underwater:
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0709/72412298/432daf4a/61023121/2522326859/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyOV9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1")
But it'll be tough to beat Susan without a robust base of donors supporting Sara.
Sara's dedicated to job creation, improving election security, implementing common sense solutions to climate change, and supporting women's health.
We know she'll be a true voice for Maine in the Senate -- but we need to pitch in all we can to elect her, because we **won 't** be able to take back the Senate if we don't win Maine. [**Join us to support Sara with a matched donation today >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0709/72412298/432daf4a/61023120/2522326859/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyOV9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+Join+us+to+support+Sara+with+a+matched+d&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1")
| | [Stand with Sara >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0709/72412298/432daf4a/61023123/2522326859/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzE5MDcyOV9TdXNhbkNvbGxpbnNfVTFfWDEiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyOCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&amount=28&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+Stand+with+Sara+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1")

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0709/72412298/432daf4a/61023122/2522326859/VEsHBw/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=12+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190729_SusanCollins_U1_X1")

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Even a few dollars makes a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
My team is worried about hitting the next fundraising goal, and I’ll be honest, so am I. Our campaign has reached out about this Wednesday’s deadline over the past few days, and we still need your help before I head to the debate stage again. **I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to maximize our momentum and help us surpass our $500,000 goal -- will you add a donation to our campaign? body:
Peter – House Democrats are
keeping our promises. Since January, the House has passed nearly
400 bills in line with our agenda to deliver results for American
families.

The GOP sees this progress – and they’re scared. That’s why
they’re ramping up their spending against vulnerable House
Democrats earlier than ever and even launching deceitful,
misleading attack ads.

Wednesday is our first deadline since fundraising totals went
public, so we must show that Democrats aren’t letting up steam
now. Will you be one of the 400 supporters we need to chip in and

( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-july19?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_190729_1_1&amount=10.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

body:

**With just two days to go before our July deadline, we 're getting closer to hitting our fundraising goal -- but we need to pick up the pace a bit.**

In the weeks and months to come -- with more debates starting tomorrow night, and millions of people starting to focus on the primary for the first time -- this campaign is going to ramp up more than ever before. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
I served with some of the most patriotic men and women on the battlefield in Afghanistan. Now, in Congress, I serve with another patriot - someone who is fighting back against corruption in DC and fighting for the American values of personal freedom and individual liberty. That person is Matt Gaetz.
Matt's determination to do what he believes is right - which isn't always popular - is just one of the many reasons that he is constantly under attack for his support of President Trump.
Matt is fighting against the D.C. swamp, and because of this, Nancy Pelosi and her liberal/socialist allies have put a target on our backs. Pelosi and national Democrats WILL NOT STOP the attacks until we are both silenced and out of office.
These are the same national Democrats that defend anti-Israel statements made by Congresswoman Ilhan Omar and support the socialist policies of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.
If Matt is going to continue to fight for what he believes in, he needs [YOUR SUPPORT TODAY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-21KTjscV6LBKXCBYCpPk-AsbN5j158-KLa0NJKQjVe4zLqk3N-zhHyYFV1QVCs2PTOnFugRq8gk039v-f3LuKsUw_MWFaLaBoIL19cFAYMI9ud9hGWfwxU0aQ4GLn0_IgRvOhra_oIOFCBQOlI5TlSMUvbDHUgzS_Y-TOh4j7pM1O7_slW_JCSiz14oMf2L&c=7ti5teZrFfwqb9yzswRf0_Dho0GdYOagz0piDsOu54X4H4LLAH0Hog==&ch=zTyCZwHTz8Nbj_CSpPJU7-uxk-1tezpbBp7bQJdNbxR93sofiDHrkA==)! name: Jess Wilkerson, Women for Wilmot
subject: I trust Wilmot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Why do I support Wilmot Collins for Senate? Because, ultimately, _**I trust him**_.
My name is Jess Wilkerson and I'm proud to be a founding member of Women for Wilmot. We need more leaders with a genuine commitment to serving the people of Montana--and I know that we can count on Wilmot to stand with women and families, just like he's done his whole life.
[**Watch the video to learn more about why I 'm supporting Wilmot Collins for Senate, then chip in $5 to his campaign now to help him unseat Steve Daines and win this race.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-women-for-wilmot-video?refcode=em190729&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-women-for-wilmot-video?refcode=em190729&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Anyone who knows Wilmot will tell you that he's a true public servant--not a politician.
Wilmot has worked with vulnerable communities, mentored at-risk youth, and has been a steadfast advocate for women and families throughout his entire career. He has also worked to build bridges with all kinds of people and get things done as the Mayor of Helena. Wilmot is someone we can count on to fight for our families and our values in the U.S. Senate.
Thank you,
Jess Wilkerson
Founding Member, Women for Wilmot
**[contribute](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-women-for-wilmot-video?refcode=em190729&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561647bb/1e3760f0/69f852e1/5f7e9b77/3285863041/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I’ll get straight to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
A lot of eyes are on us, especially leading up to tomorrow’s debate. People want to know if we can really win. We've got to show them we have the strength.
#
I’ll get straight to the point. In just a few short days, we’ll hit our important end-of-month deadline. So I'm asking for your help again today.
[Can you make a $3 donation now to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21043?refcode=ema20190729-45698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=45698%2E444211%2EC2k_nK)
For four months now, we've been traveling from town-to-town. Stopping in as many places as we possibly can to meet the people who will decide the direction of this country in our next election. What we're seeing and feeling on the ground is amazing. The people I’m meeting are hungry for change, and they’re ready to play a critical part in making it happen.
A lot of eyes are on us, especially leading up to tomorrow’s big debate. People want to know if we can really do this, if we can really win. We've got to show them we have the strength.
That’s why I’m asking again for some help, and why my ask is so timely.
[Make a $3 contribution now before we close out the month of July. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21043?refcode=ema20190729-45698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=45698%2E444211%2EC2k_nK)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21043?refcode=ema20190729-45698&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=45698%2E444211%2EC2k_nK)**
Our grassroots fundraising is a big part of what’s carried us this far and kept our campaign so strong day after day, week after week. It hasn’t always been easy but we’ve always had you on our side. Each and every donation, no matter how large or small, makes a big difference when you’re running a campaign without taking a dime from PACs, special interests, or D.C. lobbyists. Some have suggested we change course and take their checks, but that’s just not going to happen — we’re going to do this with people, and we’re going to do this with you.
I am committed to that and I am committed to showing what’s possible when you put your trust entirely in the people of this country.
Thanks for pitching in and for making this happen. I am so grateful for your continued support.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=45698%2E444211%2EC2k_nK). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Khizr Khan
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I am a Gold Star father.

I was thrust into the spotlight when Donald Trump insulted me, my loving wife, and our fallen son.

I was reminded of that painful moment this month when Trump told four Democratic women of color to "go back" to their "crime infested" countries.

**I 'd walk through broken glass to rob Trump of his power and defeat his Republican Senate.**

Every news outlet -- even Fox News -- says Democrats can defeat Mitch McConnell and win the Senate. But we must win in New Mexico to make it happen.

And I can't think of a better way to take out McConnell's Senate than by electing people of color like Ben Ray.
So I'm asking: Will you rush in $15 before Ben Ray's end-of-month deadline to support his historic candidacy and take out Mitch McConnell's Republican Senate?
** ** | | **[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3a/1300765469/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_khan_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**
---

**[**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3b/1300765469/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_khan_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=15")**
---

**[**Chip in $30 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e38/1300765469/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_khan_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=30")**
---

**[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e39/1300765469/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_khan_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=50")**
---

**[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3e/1300765469/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_khan_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**
---

I won't mince words:

Trump's racist words are backed by racist actions.

Not only did I watch him insult my wife, my fallen son, and my faith, I had to watch this president institute an illegal and racist Muslim ban.

Not only did he insult congresswomen for being people of color, he's separating babies from their families at our Southern border.

I'm calling on a wave of support before the critical deadline in 48 hours to rob Trump of his power.

[**_Please, answer my call with $15 to take out Mitch McConnell, his Republican Senate, and replace them with diverse leaders like Ben Ray. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3e/1300765469/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_khan_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Khizr Khan

** **
** **
** **
** **
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3f/1300765469/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3c/1300765469/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e3d/1300765469/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e32/1300765469/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e33/1300765469/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b504/18e32a7f/57d5a836/7bb48e30/1300765469/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125
