I was reminded of that painful moment this month when Trump told four Democratic women of color to "go back" to their "crime infested" countries. I 'd walk through broken glass to rob Trump of his power and defeat his Republican Senate. Every news outlet -- even Fox News -- says Democrats can defeat Mitch McConnell and win the Senate. But we must win in New Mexico to make it happen. And I can't think of a better way to take out McConnell's Senate than by electing people of color like Ben Ray. So I'm asking: Will you rush in $15 before Ben Ray's end-of-month deadline to support his historic candidacy and take out Mitch McConnell's Republican Senate? | | "" "" "" "" "" I won't mince words: Trump's racist words are backed by racist actions. Not only did I watch him insult my wife, my fallen son, and my faith, I had to watch this president institute an illegal and racist Muslim ban. Not only did he insult congresswomen for being people of color, he's separating babies from their families at our Southern border. I'm calling on a wave of support before the critical deadline in 48 hours to rob Trump of his power. "" Thank you, Khizr Khan | "" "" "" Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? "" We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, "" If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Mary Ellen Smith
subject: We're turning a corner in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Twenty candidates will take the stage Tuesday and Wednesday nights for the second Democratic debates, but the field won't be this crowded for long. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377173d/691c9bd/6eee10de/11a45220/1494964287/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| Friend,

You may have noticed your inbox teeming with campaign emails, and there's a good reason you've been hearing so much from this campaign and others in recent days: **We are at a pivotal moment in the 2020 race.**

Twenty candidates will take the stage Tuesday and Wednesday night for the second Democratic debates, but the field won't be this crowded for long.

**We are turning a corner. As we head into the fall and the leaders of this race begin to emerge, not everyone will be able to keep up.**

It takes resources to travel the country and talk to voters and to get our message out. It takes resources to run ads that get John's name out in all 50 states. And it'll take 130,000 unique donors to qualify for the next round of Democratic debates.

**That 's where you come in--we need you to help John become a frontrunner in this race.** [**_If you 've ever thought about chipping in to this campaign, or if you've thought about donating again, there's no time left to wait. body:

| | I'll tell you the same thing I told Stephen Colbert: **I left it all out on that debate stage --_and I don 't regret a second. _** [_**I 'm now so incredibly close to securing my spot in the next debates. I just need one final surge of support. You contribution before my End of Month Deadline in 48 hours would mean so much to me. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec0/3eb3e2fc/5a994d22/744be44a/3275228082/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec0/3eb3e2fc/5a994d22/744be44a/3275228082/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

I'll be blunt:

I didn't have the luxury of growing up a frontrunner.

I don't have wealthy donors at my disposal to fill my budget gaps.

I don't have unlimited resources to blanket the airwaves with my message.

**But what I do have are my bold ideas, a unique vision for this country, and a determination to share that vision with you. **

You deserve someone fighting for you on that debate stage -- someone who's walked a mile in your shoes.

So I'm humbly asking for $13 before my 48-hour deadline to qualify for the next debates and share my story on that stage:

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec0/3eb3e2fc/5a994d22/744be4b3/3275228082/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec0/3eb3e2fc/5a994d22/744be4b2/3275228082/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). name: Ed Markey
subject: A number I'm proud of
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

This month, our average donation through emails like this is $18.

It's a number I'm proud of because it represents the thousands of grassroots supporters like you who have pitched in to move our campaign forward to victory.

When I ran for the Senate in 2013, it cost more than $18 million to win. In 2020, during a presidential election year, it's going to cost even more.

And if we miss a single fundraising goal, we'll be at a major disadvantage when the right-wing attacks pile on.

_**[That's why I have to ask for your help to reach our urgent $25,000 July goal in the next 72 hours. Will you pitch in $18 or more and help us keep our momentum moving toward victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_1&amount=18&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

_**[Donate $18 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=18&refcode=EM-072919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $27 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-072919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $50 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM-072919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $100 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-072919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $250 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-072919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate another amount](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
Donald Trump's Republican National Committee is making my defeat one of their top priorities.

When you've been a thorn in Trump's side as long as I have, he'll spend and do anything to get rid of you from the Senate.

I've stood up to Donald Trump from day one, calling out his corruption, leading the charge in the Senate to oppose his legislative priorities, and even now, calling for his impeachment.

Donald Trump isn't used to people standing up to him, and that's put a big target on our campaign.

_**[That's why I need you today, friend. Will you pitch in $18 and help us fight for victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_1&amount=18&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks for standing with me,

Ed

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Let's end Mitch McConnell's era of obstruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
When it comes to the 2020 election, there is more at stake than the presidency. It is also imperative that we take back the Senate and end Mitch McConnell's reign as Majority Leader.
On crucial issue after crucial issue, McConnell is blocking our progress and jeopardizing our future. Just last week, after both Robert Mueller and FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed that Russia is intent on interfering in our 2020 elections, McConnell and Senate Republicans blocked bills that would take action to protect our elections and defend our democracy.
[**This is why we need a Democratic majority in the Senate, Peter. To make that happen, I need you to step up and help me meet my end-of-month fundraising goal. Will you stand with me and contribute $5 to help us take back the Senate?**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-july-2019?refcode=em190729&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
With a Democratic Senate, we can pass meaningful legislation to bring down the price of prescription drugs, act on climate change, reform our gun laws, and more. But none of that can happen in "Grim Reaper" Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard.
We can win back the Senate in 2020, but it's not going to be easy. Not only do we need to elect new Democrats, we need to defend every Democratic seat--including right here in Illinois. I need supporters like you to stand with me and help me meet my end-of-month goals right now.
[**Will you stand with me in this fight, Peter? Help elect a Democratic Senate majority in 2020 and end the GOP 's era of obstruction. Contribute $5 now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-july-2019?refcode=em190729&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eom-july-2019?refcode=em190729&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cfc/42ab3cf4/623cf36a/135d7798/511720359/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cfc/42ab3cf4/623cf36a/135d7799/511720359/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Fear, leadership, and the Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

Whether it’s the Atlanta district of John Lewis, the Baltimore district of Elijah Cummings — or Detroit, Minneapolis, the Bronx, or Boston — the president flings insults at the American people to try to shame the public servants they have elected to represent them. It is also obvious that there is a unique contempt he holds for his black and brown critics.

Since launching my campaign for the United States Senate in Georgia, I’ve called for the House to begin impeachment proceedings against the president. We cannot allow fear to cause us to shrink from our constitutional duty.

I wrote about fear and leadership in the Democratic Party in a post you can read here.

While the unacceptable, unabating racism that spews from the president’s mouth and Twitter account must be rejected outright. Democrats must focus on our advocacy for a progressive agenda that delivers for the people.

I won my first election for mayor of Columbus, Georgia, in the Tea Party wave of 2010, and I did it by being fearless about my beliefs. That’s the playbook Lucy McBath used to win a Republican +8 district in Georgia last year, and how “The Squad” - Congresswomen Ilhan Omar, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib - commands our attention to the issues they highlight every day.

Leadership with moral clarity is what we have to be fighting for.

There’s good policy, and then there’s what the people running are going to do to rally people around it. For far too long, fear has caused Democrats to cede territory to Republicans — whether it’s talking about healthcare, gun violence, or a host of other issues. But I’m not scared. Read my post about fear and leadership, and how we’re running in Georgia to write a new playbook for 2020.

–Teresa

P.S. Our monthly deadline is just 2 days away — pitch in a donation using this link to help keep us on track.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teresa-tomlinson-1?refcode=crippling-political-fear]

<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/fear-leadership-and-the-democratic-party/]

name: Team Kamala
subject: A list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Here are three facts about this race:
1. Trump has raised well over $100 million for his re-election campaign.

2. Trump and Mitch McConnell received an hour-long briefing about the top threats to his re-election. Kamala was at the top of the list.

3. We have a crucial fundraising deadline approaching Wednesday, and we have a ways to go to reach it:

**Trump has mega-donors, huge corporations, and dark money PACs willing to cut blank checks to buy him four more years in power. We have you. name: Dan Baer
subject: RE: Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Make no mistake: My race in Colorado will be McConnell's first line of attack.
|
---

| | I know you're getting a lot of emails today, so I promise this will be quick:

[**I'm asking for $19 before the End of Month Deadline so I can flip must-win Colorado and win the entire Senate. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a1285b/4111030339/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Mitch McConnell just announced that ultra wealthy donors and corporations funneled over $20 million to a Super PAC and dark money group to protect his Republican Senate majority.

He knows that Democrats have never had a better chance then we have right now to flip the Senate and oust him once and for all.

And make no mistake: My race in Colorado will be McConnell's first line of attack.

If we can't fight back and flip this seat, we're looking at another two years of his obstructionist Republican Senate.

The Supreme Court, health care, tackling climate change, investing in education... it's all on the line.

That's why I keep asking for money -- not because I like it, but because we need it to win. _**And because donors like you really can make the difference!**_

So, I'm asking: Can I count on your support with $19 before my critical End of Month deadline so we can win my race, flip the entire Senate, and oust Mitch McConnell?
| | [**Donate $19 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a1285b/4111030339/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

[**Donate $35 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a12858/4111030339/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=35&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $50 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a12859/4111030339/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=50&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate $100 now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a1285e/4111030339/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=100&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

[**Donate another amount now >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a1285f/4111030339/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190729_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")
---

I know that we are sending a lot of emails. I'm grateful to everyone who has already chipped in (some of you 3, 4, or 5 times!).

Thanks,

Dan

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a1285c/4111030339/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a1285d/4111030339/VEsO/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827ab/232dfd1/9c6f2c1/62a12842/4111030339/VEsP/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: contempt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello - Donald Trump's RNC desperately wants to see Ed defeated. But we're matching their contempt for accountability with the power for grassroots supporters like you.

_**[Ed is facing a big deadline in 72 hours, and we need to raise an urgent $25,000 to stand up to Trump and the RNC. Will you pitch in $18 and help Ed fight for victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_2&amount=18&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
Hello,

This month, our average donation through emails like this is $18.

It's a number I'm proud of because it represents the thousands of grassroots supporters like you who have pitched in to move our campaign forward to victory.

When I ran for the Senate in 2013, it cost me more than $18 million to win. In 2020, during a presidential election year, it's going to cost even more.

And if we miss a single fundraising goal, we'll be at a major disadvantage when the right-wing attacks pile on.

_**[That's why I have to ask for your help to reach our urgent $25,000 July goal in the next 72 hours. Will you pitch in $18 or more and help us keep our momentum moving toward victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_2&amount=18&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

_**[Donate $18 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=18&refcode=EM-072919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $27 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-072919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $100 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-072919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $250 now](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-072919_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate another amount](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
Donald Trump's Republican National Committee is making my defeat one of their top priorities.

When you've been a thorn in Trump's side as long as I have, he'll spend and do anything to get rid of you from the Senate.

I've stood up to Donald Trump from day one, calling out his corruption, leading the charge in the Senate to oppose his legislative priorities, and even now, calling for his impeachment.

Donald Trump isn't used to people standing up to him, and that's put a big target on our campaign.

_**[That's why I need you today, friend. Will you pitch in $18 and help us fight for victory?](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-july2019-weekly?refcode=EM-072919_2&amount=18&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks for standing with me,

Ed

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | | |
---
| Friend -- Earlier today, Quinnipiac released a new poll with Andrew at 2% – our fourth qualifying poll for the September debate! Andrew hit the donor threshold back in June, so this earns him a spot in the next round of debates. When I joined this campaign, I knew what all of you know. That Andrew's message would take the political establishment by surprise. That Andrew would continue to talk about issues that all other politicians ignore, yet are the issues that we need to solve. That Andrew's focus on solutions and not ideology would be a breath of fresh air. You and I both know a secret that the political establishment doesn’t know. Andrew is going to take his ‘Not left, not right, but forward’ message all the way to the White House. clean_body: | | | | | Friend -- Earlier today, Quinnipiac released a new poll with Andrew at 2% – our fourth qualifying poll for the September debate! Andrew hit the donor threshold back in June, so this earns him a spot in the next round of debates. When I joined this campaign, I knew what all of you know. That Andrew's message would take the political establishment by surprise. That Andrew would continue to talk about issues that all other politicians ignore, yet are the issues that we need to solve. That Andrew's focus on solutions and not ideology would be a breath of fresh air. You and I both know a secret that the political establishment doesn’t know. Andrew is going to take his ‘Not left, not right, but forward’ message all the way to the White House. Our campaign is going to continue to grow. I've known it. You've known it. Today, the rest of America knows it. This is going to be fun, Zach Graumann Campaign Manager | | | | Can you make a donation today? Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people. Join the Yang Gang! If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application and someone from our team will reach out. | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

body:
Here's what we told Francis while he's away: | [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Here's something you may not know about Francis: He currently serves as a Commander in the Navy Reserves.

He's proud to still serve our country, but it requires him to depart for his Annual Training for 2 weeks.

But, just because he's fulfilling his duty to serve doesn't mean our mission to win can slow down!

[**We told Francis that while he 's away, we'd raise the $12,000 we need to reach our July fundraising goal. Will you help us get there by donating to our Patriot Fund now?**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-july19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+We+told+Francis+that+while+hersquos+away&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1a0/388db0e9/81ec2b3/609afaa5/2105394113/VEsO/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b1a0/388db0e9/81ec2b3/609afaa4/2105394113/VEsP/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190729_1_1")**

name: Michael Toppen, Team Hickenlooper
subject: No time to waste
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Did you see Mary Ellen's message this morning? She's absolutely right about the importance of this moment. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377173c/691c9bd/6ee215b7/11a45340/2209726535/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, did you see Mary Ellen's message this morning?

She's absolutely right about the importance of this moment. The 2020 elections may feel far away, but the truth is that what happens in the next few weeks will determine the outcome of the election--and the next four years.

[**_If you want a pragmatic progressive to take on Trump in 2020, chip in now to help John get there._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190729_MT_20190729-fr-MT-pivotaltopper-nop_nop_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,
Michael

Michael Toppen
The Finance Team
Hickenlooper 2020

\---------------------------

**Sender:** Mary Ellen Smith
**Subject:** We're turning a corner in this race
**Date:** Mon July 29

Friend,

You may have noticed your inbox teeming with campaign emails, and there's a good reason you've been hearing so much from this campaign and others in recent days: **We are at a pivotal moment in the 2020 race.**

Twenty candidates will take the stage Tuesday and Wednesday night for the second Democratic debates, but the field won't be this crowded for long.

**We are turning a corner. As we head into the fall and the leaders of this race begin to emerge, not everyone will be able to keep up.**

It takes resources to travel the country and talk to voters and to get our message out. It takes resources to run ads that get John's name out in all 50 states. And it'll take 130,000 unique donors to qualify for the next round of Democratic debates.

**That 's where you come in--we need you to help John become a frontrunner in this race.** [**_If you 've ever thought about chipping in to this campaign, or if you've thought about donating again, there's no time left to wait. Chip in any amount now to help John break out in this race._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA My friend Ben Ray is up against his critical end-of-month deadline in 48 hours. If we want to defeat McConnell's Senate, we MUST give all our money to Ben Ray! ALL OF IT! I still need 2,673 folks to step up for him before the deadline. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b505/18e32a7f/542674cb/7bb465e4/923695336/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b505/18e32a7f/542674cb/7bb465e5/923695336/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b505/18e32a7f/542674cb/7bb4659a/923695336/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: A single truth you won't (probably) hear in the debates.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dfae/6cd27893/507f6575/1580b9d5/780591616/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | This week, twenty Democrats running for president will debate once again. They'll talk about their big plans to create jobs, improve health care, tackle the climate crisis, fix immigration, restore our democracy, and much more. But the truth remains: unless we take back the Senate, nothing will change. Winning back the Senate means protecting every single seat we currently hold - including mine. I've spent my whole career going after people with power and money to fight for the underdogs. [**Whether it's Wall Street, Pharma, Big Oil, or now the for-profit corporations making money locking up children at the border, plenty of special interests want to see me gone. I'm counting on you to help me fight back.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dfae/6cd27893/507f6575/1580b9d2/780591616/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-07-29-eom2&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") We cannot let Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies hold us back. **For each good idea we hear on that debate stage,****_nothing_****will get done as long as Mitch McConnell is Senate Majority Leader.** That's why I decided against running for president in 2020 -- because taking back and fixing the Senate is _crucial_. This isn't a secret. They're going to spend massively to try to stop us. Our grassroots army has to be ready. [**Donate before July's end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2dfae/6cd27893/507f6575/1580b9d2/780591616/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA clean_body: | "" | | This week, twenty Democrats running for president will debate once again. They'll talk about their big plans to create jobs, improve health care, tackle the climate crisis, fix immigration, restore our democracy, and much more. But the truth remains: unless we take back the Senate, nothing will change. Winning back the Senate means protecting every single seat we currently hold - including mine. I've spent my whole career going after people with power and money to fight for the underdogs. "" We cannot let Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies hold us back. For each good idea we hear on that debate stage,nothingwill get done as long as Mitch McConnell is Senate Majority Leader. That's why I decided against running for president in 2020 -- because taking back and fixing the Senate is crucial. This isn't a secret. They're going to spend massively to try to stop us. Our grassroots army has to be ready. "" Let's show the Democrats running for president that we're committed to delivering our next president a functioning, progressive Senate in 2020. Derek,

**We 're coming up on the first significant fundraising deadline since Scott Taylor announced his campaign**, and we're counting on your help to prove that Mark has the grassroots strength needed to win next November!

With a challenger backed by big special interest donors and President Trump reportedly targeting Virginia, it's going to take an **all-out effort** to defend Mark and keep the Commonwealth blue in 2020.

Remember, _Mark only won by less than one percentage point in 2014_. We can't take anything for granted -- the stakes are too high with everything from health care to the security of our elections on the line!

**That 's why we've set a goal of earning the support of 1,000 new donors before Wednesday's end-of-month deadline. Will you make your first donation today to help us reach this crucial goal?**

name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: Howdy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
I just wanted to see if you could answer a quick question. It’s important as we get towards the end of the month.
#
Quick question for you:
[Can you chip in $3 to Beto before our end-of-July deadline? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21067?refcode=ema20190729-45699&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=45699%2E444211%2EoC6rDE)
I’ll be honest. This month hasn’t been great for fundraising. We saw an uptick towards the end of the last quarter ($600,000!!) But in July, our numbers levelled off. Now we’re short on where we wanted to be for the month.
It’s not the end of the world. We’ve got what we need to keep this campaign strong and pay people like me to write these emails and talk to voters. But if we don’t increase our pace, we’ll have to consider scaling back some of the more ambitious projects we’ve wanted to invest in (for example, making Artemis an Instagram influencer*).
**It would mean a lot if you could give a donation today.**
**I know you hear this a lot but it really is true: when it comes to this campaign, grassroots fundraising is the whole shebang. This is a campaign about people, funded by people. Half of our money comes from emails like this one! No PACs, no corporations, no special interests. Just hundreds of thousands of people chipping in to make this campaign a success. And a dog who is an influencer.***
[Help us close the gap on our July shortfall. Make a $3 donation today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/21067?refcode=ema20190729-45699&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=45699%2E444211%2EoC6rDE)
Thanks for all you do,
Rob Flaherty
Digital Director
Beto for America

*We are not actually doing this. Yet.

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=45699%2E444211%2EoC6rDE). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Make your voice heard before tomorrow's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We know that in order to achieve meaningful progress on the issues so many Americans care about, we need to end voter suppression so that the voice of the people can be heard. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa520/34a064cc/19e8c034/703d296/825330816/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Tomorrow, Democratic candidates will again take the debate stage and share their vision for the country. We know that in order to achieve meaningful progress on the issues so many Americans care about, we need to end voter suppression so that the voice of the people can be heard. And we want to hear from you, friend, about the challenges your community is facing and the issues you most want to hear the candidates discuss this week. [**Will you take a moment to complete our survey and let us know what 's on your mind before tomorrow?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa520/34a064cc/19e8c034/703d297/825330816/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/debate-survey?source=IE072919SURVEY") During last month's debate, moderators didn't pose a single question to the candidates about voting rights despite breaking news that very same week of Supreme Court rulings that could dramatically impact whether our government is truly representative. But the truth is that all of our rights and the policy issues we care most about are underpinned by the right to vote. [**Will you let us know if you'd like to hear the candidates discuss voting rights in this week's debates?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa520/34a064cc/19e8c034/703d297/825330816/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/debate-survey?source=IE072919SURVEY") Thanks for making your voice heard,
Team Fair Fight **[take our survey](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa520/34a064cc/19e8c034/703d297/825330816/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/debate-survey?source=IE072919SURVEY")**

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec1/3eb3e2fc/5ab8a163/744be61d/3222999928/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec1/3eb3e2fc/5ab8a163/744be61c/3222999928/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcec1/3eb3e2fc/5ab8a163/744be61b/3222999928/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Warren
subject: Here's what we have for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President

We'll win in 2020 and make real change in 2021 -- to make Washington work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected, thanks to your support. subject: These stickers are going to go fast!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Chip in to get a bumper sticker!
|
---

| | | **Help us spread the word about Andy 's campaign for governor with a bumper sticker!**

| [**CHIP IN $5 TO GET A BUMPER STICKER!**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b12/ad6dc73/14b9836c/db43dff/763106489/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-newstick?refcode=20190729nd__173__&amount=5")
---
Hey Peter -- we've been busy at Beshear HQ rolling out new policy proposals, signing up volunteers, and hitting the road to talk to Kentuckians.

While we were spending all that time criss-crossing the commonwealth, we decided earlier this month to spruce up our logo a bit. Check out the final product:
[](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b12/ad6dc73/14b9836c/db43dff/763106489/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-newstick?refcode=20190729nd__173__&amount=5")
---
[**Donate $5 today to get your own brand new Beshear/Coleman bumper sticker.**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b12/ad6dc73/14b9836c/db43dff/763106489/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-newstick?refcode=20190729nd__173__&amount=5")

These are going to go fast, Peter, so be sure to order your sticker ASAP!

Thanks,

\-- Team Beshear

[**DONATE**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b12/ad6dc73/14b9836c/db43dff/763106489/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-newstick?refcode=20190729nd__173__&amount=5")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: critical deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Putting People First. It’s what Governor Holcomb has always been about, and it’s what his re-election campaign for Governor is about. **HOLCOMB CREW OFFICIAL JULY END-OF-MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE** _This month, Gov. Holcomb officially announced his re-election campaign to continue Putting People First, and now we’re facing our first big deadline.
